summary: A recorded NewsNation remote interview, posted by TSA, in a split-screen format. A male anchor sits at left in front of a Capitol-dome studio backdrop, and TSA Acting Deputy Administrator Adam Stahl joins by video at right in front of an American flag and a U.S. Department of Homeland Security / TSA seal backdrop, marked LIVE. A red lower-third chyron reads 'TSA: ON VERGE OF CLOSING AIRPORTS' beneath a 'BREAKING NEWS' label and a NewsNation bug. The narration concerns airport wait times and TSA officers working without pay during the shutdown. The audio is broadcast interview speech.

script.scene: Split screen: a male anchor at left before a Capitol-dome backdrop, the TSA Acting Deputy Administrator by video at right before a US flag and DHS/TSA seal, marked LIVE; chyron 'TSA: ON VERGE OF CLOSING AIRPORTS' with BREAKING NEWS label.
Same split-screen layout continues as the interview proceeds.

notable_text: BREAKING NEWS; TSA: ON VERGE OF CLOSING AIRPORTS; NEWS NATION; LIVE
